name: Azure Blob Storage
description: List containers, list blobs, and read blob contents from Azure Storage via agent tools.

accountName.label: Storage account name
accountName.help: Used with account key when no connection string is set (fallback: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME).

accountKey.label: Storage account key
accountKey.help: Shared key for the account (fallback: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_KEY).

accountUrl.label: Blob service URL
accountUrl.help: Override blob endpoint (sovereign clouds, custom domain). Default: https://{account}.blob.core.windows.net

defaultContainer.label: Default container
defaultContainer.help: Optional default container when the tool omits containerName.
